message:
feat(tui): add unified Timeline view with cross-pane correlations (wa-6sk.4)

Implements the TUI Timeline view (View 8) across both backends:

- state.rs: Timeline variant in View enum, state fields (timeline,
  timeline_zoom, timeline_scroll, timeline_count), 4 new actions
  (ZoomIn/Out, ScrollLeft/Right), reducer handlers
- view_adapters.rs: TimelineRow struct and adapt_timeline_event()
  adapter with format_correlations() helper
- query.rs: get_timeline() method on QueryClient trait with
  ProductionQueryClient implementation
- keymap.rs: Timeline scope, keybindings (j/k nav, +/- zoom,
  h/l scroll), GoToView(8), action_label entries
- ftui_stub.rs: Full Timeline rendering with two-panel layout
  (list + detail), WaModel fields, key handling, data refresh
- views.rs: Timeline placeholder for ratatui backend
- app.rs: Timeline in key dispatch and render dispatch

102 timeline tests pass (9 state reducer, 13 view adapter,
10 ftui render/behavior, 70 pre-existing storage timeline tests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+    // -- timeline --
+    TimelineZoomIn,
+    TimelineZoomOut,
+    TimelineScrollLeft,
+    TimelineScrollRight,
 }
